display.purpose: Page-level headings and major institutional framing.

title.purpose: Subsection headers and compact heading rows.

body.purpose: Core explanatory copy and workflow text.

label.purpose: Uppercase metadata labels, field labels, compact UI context.

shadows.name: surface-rest
shadows.purpose: Subtle resting definition for cards and panels.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Default hover and state transitions for controls.

motion.name: panel-slide
motion.purpose: Help panel entry and other directional surface transitions.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Compresses animation and transition duration to near-instant feedback.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action for high-commitment workflow steps.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary{border:1px solid color-mix(in oklch,var(--accent,oklch(0.44 0.1 248)),white 56%);border-radius:999px;background:color-mix(in oklch,var(--surface-accent,oklch(0.92 0.028 248)),white 42%);color:color-mix(in oklch,var(--accent,oklch(0.44 0.1 248)),black 16%);font-family:var(--sans,"Public Sans","Noto Sans",sans-serif);font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:650;padding:7px 12px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:background-color 140ms ease,border-color 140ms ease,color 140ms ease}.ds-btn-primary:hover{background:color-mix(in oklch,var(--surface-accent,oklch(0.92 0.028 248)),white 32%);border-color:color-mix(in oklch,var(--accent,oklch(0.44 0.1 248)),white 40%);color:color-mix(in oklch,var(--accent,oklch(0.44 0.1 248)),black 22%)}.ds-btn-primary:focus-visible{outline:3px solid color-mix(in oklch,var(--accent,oklch(0.44 0.1 248)),white 22%);outline-offset:2px}.ds-btn-primary:active{transform:translateY(1px)}

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary{border:1px solid var(--line-strong,oklch(0.74 0.02 248));border-radius:999px;background:var(--surface-muted,oklch(0.93 0.012 248));color:var(--ink-default,oklch(0.37 0.024 248));font-family:var(--sans,"Public Sans","Noto Sans",sans-serif);font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:650;padding:7px 12px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:background-color 140ms ease,border-color 140ms ease,color 140ms ease}.ds-btn-secondary:hover{background:color-mix(in oklch,var(--surface-accent,oklch(0.92 0.028 248)),white 44%);border-color:color-mix(in oklch,var(--accent,oklch(0.44 0.1 248)),white 56%);color:var(--ink-strong,oklch(0.26 0.028 248))}.ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible{outline:3px solid color-mix(in oklch,var(--accent,oklch(0.44 0.1 248)),white 22%);outline-offset:2px}.ds-btn-secondary:active{transform:translateY(1px)}

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Default field treatment for forms and structured entry.
components.html: <label class="ds-field-label" for="ds-field">Debate motion</label><input class="ds-field-input" id="ds-field" type="text" placeholder="Resolved: ..." />
components.css: .ds-field-label{display:block;margin-bottom:6px;font-family:var(--sans,"Public Sans","Noto Sans",sans-serif);font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.04em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink-soft,oklch(0.5 0.02 248))}.ds-field-input{width:100%;border:1px solid var(--line-strong,oklch(0.74 0.02 248));border-radius:8px;background:var(--surface-raised,oklch(0.985 0.006 248));color:var(--ink-strong,oklch(0.26 0.028 248));font-family:var(--sans,"Public Sans","Noto Sans",sans-serif);font-size:14px;padding:10px 12px;transition:border-color 140ms ease,background-color 140ms ease}.ds-field-input:hover{background:color-mix(in oklch,var(--surface-accent,oklch(0.92 0.028 248)),white 46%)}.ds-field-input:focus-visible{outline:3px solid color-mix(in oklch,var(--accent,oklch(0.44 0.1 248)),white 22%);outline-offset:2px}

components.name: Navigation Pill Link
components.description: Primary navigation chip with active state parity across top nav and overflow nav.
components.html: VerdictAudits
components.css: .ds-nav{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px}.ds-nav-link{border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:999px;padding:7px 11px;font-family:var(--sans,"Public Sans","Noto Sans",sans-serif);font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--ink-default,oklch(0.37 0.024 248));text-decoration:none;background:transparent;transition:background-color 140ms ease,border-color 140ms ease,color 140ms ease}.ds-nav-link:hover{background:var(--surface-muted,oklch(0.93 0.012 248));border-color:var(--line,oklch(0.84 0.015 248));color:var(--ink-strong,oklch(0.26 0.028 248))}.ds-nav-link:focus-visible{outline:3px solid color-mix(in oklch,var(--accent,oklch(0.44 0.1 248)),white 22%);outline-offset:2px}.ds-nav-link-active{border-color:color-mix(in oklch,var(--accent,oklch(0.44 0.1 248)),white 45%);background:color-mix(in oklch,var(--surface-accent,oklch(0.92 0.028 248)),white 42%);color:var(--ink-strong,oklch(0.26 0.028 248));font-weight:600}

components.name: Panel Card
components.description: Primary content container for state summaries, forms, and tabular sections.
components.html:
Current Snapshot

Canonical facts, reasoning score, and coverage are grouped in one review block.
components.css: .ds-card{border:1px solid var(--line,oklch(0.84 0.015 248));background:var(--surface-raised,oklch(0.985 0.006 248));border-radius:14px;padding:24px;box-shadow:0 1px 1px color-mix(in oklch,var(--ink-strong,oklch(0.26 0.028 248)),white 92%)}.ds-card-title{margin:0 0 8px;font-family:var(--serif,"Source Serif 4","Literata",serif);font-size:1.15rem;line-height:1.2;color:var(--ink-strong,oklch(0.26 0.028 248))}.ds-card-copy{margin:0;max-width:66ch;font-family:var(--sans,"Public Sans","Noto Sans",sans-serif);font-size:0.97rem;line-height:1.56;color:var(--ink-default,oklch(0.37 0.024 248))}.ds-card:hover{border-color:var(--line-strong,oklch(0.74 0.02 248))}.ds-card:focus-within{outline:3px solid color-mix(in oklch,var(--accent,oklch(0.44 0.1 248)),white 22%);outline-offset:2px}

components.name: Semantic Status Pill
components.description: Compact metadata indicator with semantic status variants.
components.css: .ds-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:baseline;gap:4px;border:1px solid var(--line-strong,oklch(0.74 0.02 248));border-radius:999px;padding:6px 10px;font-family:var(--mono,"Red Hat Mono","Menlo","Consolas",monospace);font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--ink-default,oklch(0.37 0.024 248));background:var(--surface-muted,oklch(0.93 0.012 248))}.ds-pill[data-state='good']{background:color-mix(in oklch,var(--good,oklch(0.55 0.14 155)),white 86%);border-color:color-mix(in oklch,var(--good,oklch(0.55 0.14 155)),white 72%);color:color-mix(in oklch,var(--good,oklch(0.55 0.14 155)),black 26%)}.ds-pill[data-state='warn']{background:color-mix(in oklch,var(--warn,oklch(0.69 0.14 88)),white 84%);border-color:color-mix(in oklch,var(--warn,oklch(0.69 0.14 88)),white 70%);color:color-mix(in oklch,var(--warn,oklch(0.69 0.14 88)),black 30%)}.ds-pill[data-state='bad']{background:color-mix(in oklch,var(--bad,oklch(0.57 0.17 28)),white 86%);border-color:color-mix(in oklch,var(--bad,oklch(0.57 0.17 28)),white 70%);color:color-mix(in oklch,var(--bad,oklch(0.57 0.17 28)),black 28%)}.ds-pill:focus-visible{outline:3px solid color-mix(in oklch,var(--accent,oklch(0.44 0.1 248)),white 22%);outline-offset:2px}

components.name: Data Table Shell
components.description: Scrollable table container with sticky identity column and restrained borders.
components.css: .ds-table-wrap{overflow:auto;border:1px solid var(--line,oklch(0.84 0.015 248));border-radius:10px;background:var(--surface-muted,oklch(0.93 0.012 248));position:relative}.ds-table{width:100%;min-width:560px;border-collapse:collapse;font-family:var(--sans,"Public Sans","Noto Sans",sans-serif);font-size:0.86rem}.ds-table th,.ds-table td{padding:10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line,oklch(0.84 0.015 248));text-align:left;vertical-align:top;color:var(--ink-default,oklch(0.37 0.024 248))}.ds-table th{font-size:0.72rem;letter-spacing:0.03em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink-soft,oklch(0.5 0.02 248))}.ds-table tbody tr:hover td{background:color-mix(in oklch,var(--surface-accent,oklch(0.92 0.028 248)),white 52%)}.ds-table td:first-child,.ds-table th:first-child{position:sticky;left:0;background:color-mix(in oklch,var(--surface-muted,oklch(0.93 0.012 248)),var(--surface-raised,oklch(0.985 0.006 248)) 35%)}

components.name: Help Drawer
components.description: Right-edge glossary panel used for contextual definitions without leaving task flow.
components.html:
Glossary
Key terms and metrics used throughout the system.
components.css: .ds-help-panel{width:min(380px,100%);height:100%;background:var(--surface-raised,oklch(0.985 0.006 248));border-left:1px solid var(--line,oklch(0.84 0.015 248));display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:transform 180ms ease}.ds-help-header{position:sticky;top:0;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:12px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line,oklch(0.84 0.015 248));background:var(--surface-raised,oklch(0.985 0.006 248));font-family:var(--sans,"Public Sans","Noto Sans",sans-serif);color:var(--ink-strong,oklch(0.26 0.028 248))}.ds-help-close{width:32px;height:32px;border:1px solid var(--line-strong,oklch(0.74 0.02 248));border-radius:8px;background:var(--surface-muted,oklch(0.93 0.012 248));color:var(--ink-strong,oklch(0.26 0.028 248));cursor:pointer;font-size:1.1rem;line-height:1}.ds-help-close:hover{background:color-mix(in oklch,var(--surface-accent,oklch(0.92 0.028 248)),white 44%)}.ds-help-close:focus-visible{outline:3px solid color-mix(in oklch,var(--accent,oklch(0.44 0.1 248)),white 22%);outline-offset:2px}.ds-help-body{padding:14px;font-family:var(--sans,"Public Sans","Noto Sans",sans-serif);font-size:0.84rem;line-height:1.45;color:var(--ink-default,oklch(0.37 0.024 248))}

narrative.overview:
This system should feel like a public record interface for serious reasoning, not a social feed and not a startup landing page. Every surface should communicate that arguments are being processed in a procedural environment where clarity, traceability, and fairness are more important than visual spectacle.

Density is moderate and deliberate. Panels, tables, and status strips are grouped with consistent spacing and soft structural boundaries so users can track debate state without cognitive overload. Motion remains functional and restrained, with reduced-motion support as a first-class requirement.

The interface explicitly rejects "trend-heavy vibecoded aesthetics that prioritize novelty over clarity" and rejects "overly playful or entertainment-first visual language that weakens perceived procedural integrity." It is rigorous, calm, and institutional at every decision point.
keyCharacteristics: Clear hierarchy built on serif headings and neutral sans body text.
Tinted blue-gray neutrals that preserve composure while avoiding sterile grayscale.
Semantic status colors used for evidence and verdict context, never as decorative noise.
Flat-by-default surfaces with minimal shadow and strong border logic.
Navigation and actions that emphasize next-step clarity over visual novelty.

rules.name: The Evidence-First Contrast Rule
rules.body: Accent and status colors are for state and meaning. If a color does not encode action, verdict, confidence, or system condition, it should be removed.

rules.name: The Ledger Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Serif marks structure, sans carries explanation, mono marks evidence metadata. Do not swap these roles.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: If a component is not floating above other content, it should rely on border and tone, not blur-heavy shadow.

dos: **Do** keep action hierarchy explicit: primary actions use accent treatment, secondary actions stay neutral, destructive/error actions stay semantic.
**Do** use status colors only for meaning-bearing states (success, caution, error, verdict confidence context), not decoration.
**Do** preserve the spacing scale (`4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48`) and card padding rhythm (`24px` desktop, `16px` compact).
**Do** keep reduced-motion support active and test with `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` before shipping.
**Do** maintain strong keyboard-visible focus for every interactive control.
donts: **Don't** introduce Social-feed styling that introduces status signals or engagement gamification (likes, popularity badges, influencer-style profiles).
**Don't** use Trend-heavy "vibecoded" aesthetics that prioritize novelty over clarity (neon glows, decorative gradients, excessive visual effects).
**Don't** drift into Overly playful or entertainment-first visual language that weakens perceived procedural integrity.
**Don't** replace semantic status meaning with purely decorative color usage.
**Don't** remove border structure in favor of blur-heavy elevation or glass-like overlays.
